name: Harry
description: Soooo, this is a very self-indulgent thing about a ship between Harry Osborn and Peter Parker from the 2017 show, so it probably kind of sucks, but if you like it, yay. It makes me really happy if you do, but if you don't, that's fine. Ships and niche things like this aren't exactly for everyone. Also, if you have one, I would recommend using a Peter Parker Persona, or something similar, but you can always just make one if you're willing to. Also, Harry and Peter are 18 in this, so this is less the school dance from the show, and more so a... college-adjacent dance. So technically, by definition, this is a ever-so-slightly different AU. So... have fun? I don't know what else to put here.
creator: Roxas7374
